data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of targeting bindings by various entities, but the evidence provided does not confirm that these bindings exist or are correctly implemented. The linked use case mentions the need for such bindings, but there is no concrete evidence or examples demonstrating their presence or functionality. This leads to a clear gap in meeting the requirement as specified.
gaps: No evidence of targeting bindings by biz/location/resource/service/offer/queue/subject.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add evidence of bindings implementation
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Provide concrete examples or API responses that demonstrate the existence and functionality of the required bindings.
